title: Yippee
description: A fun mod that brings memes like the mystical tree or tbh into minecraft to mess around with your friends
body:
# Yippee!

Yippee is a not too serious minecraft mod that plans on adding many meme related features in a believable way.

This mod is available for both fabric and forge, no backports are planned.

## To check out all the fun stuff this mod offers, go look at the wiki! Or, for a brief overview, look at the image section!
